### 1. Overall Monorepo Layout

The T3 Code project is a Bun-based monorepo with the following structure:

- `apps/server` - Backend server application
- `apps/web` - React web application (Vite + TanStack Router)
- `apps/desktop` - Electron desktop application
- `apps/marketing` - Marketing site
- `packages/contracts` - Shared type contracts
- `packages/shared` - Shared utilities
- `scripts/` - Build and development scripts

---

### 2. packages/shared Package

**Location:** `/private/var/folders/vq/9q38rw0x2455zr_whqcrjbhr0000gn/T/planmode-bench-wt-run-1775474678796-44yk9x/packages/shared`

- `src/git.ts` - Git utilities

### 3. packages/contracts Package

**Location:** `/private/var/folders/vq/9q38rw0x2455zr_whqcrjbhr0000gn/T/planmode-bench-wt-run-1775474678796-44yk9x/packages/contracts`

**Main exports (src/index.ts):**
```typescript

```

**Key Schema Definitions (src/baseSchemas.ts):**
- Branded type IDs: ThreadId, ProjectId, CommandId, EventId, MessageId, TurnId
- Provider IDs: ProviderItemId, RuntimeSessionId, RuntimeItemId, RuntimeRequestId, RuntimeTaskId, ApprovalRequestId, CheckpointRef
- Base schemas: TrimmedString, TrimmedNonEmptyString, NonNegativeInt, PositiveInt, IsoDateTime
- Uses Effect schema library for validation and TypeScript integration

**Dependencies:**

**Build System:**
- Uses `tsdown` for dual ESM/CJS build output
- Builds to `dist/index.mjs` and `dist/index.cjs`

---

### 4. apps/web Package

**Location:** `/private/var/folders/vq/9q38rw0x2455zr_whqcrjbhr0000gn/T/planmode-bench-wt-run-1775474678796-44yk9x/apps/web`

**Main Entry Point:** `src/main.tsx`
```typescript
import React from "react";
import ReactDOM from "react-dom/client";
import { RouterProvider } from "@tanstack/react-router";
import { createHashHistory, createBrowserHistory } from "@tanstack/react-router";

// Uses hash history for Electron, browser history for web
// Renders RouterProvider with global toast providers
```

**Routing:**
- **Router File:** `src/router.ts`
- Uses TanStack Router with React Router plugin
- Route tree auto-generated: `routeTree.gen.ts`
- **Root Route:** `src/routes/__root.tsx` - Sets up providers, error boundaries, toast system
- **Routes:**
  - `_chat.tsx` - Chat layout
  - `_chat.$threadId.tsx` - Individual thread view
  - `_chat.index.tsx` - Default chat view
  - `_chat.settings.tsx` - Settings page
- **Context Wrapping:** QueryClientProvider → StoreProvider → Router

**Key Stores/Hooks:**
- **Store:** `src/store.ts` - Global app state (projects, threads, hydration) using Zustand
- **Theme Hook:** `src/hooks/useTheme.ts` - Theme management (light/dark/system)
- **App Settings:** `src/appSettings.ts` - Persisted app configuration
- **Terminal State:** `src/terminalStateStore.ts` - Terminal session state
- **Composer Draft:** `src/composerDraftStore.ts` - Draft message persistence

**Component Structure (src/components/):**
- `ui/` - 40 UI components built with @base-ui/react
  - Basic: button, input, textarea, select, combobox, autocomplete
  - Layout: card, dialog, sheet, sidebar, scroll-area
  - Complex: menu, popover, tooltip, alert-dialog
  - Form: field, input-group, checkbox, radio-group, switch, toggle
  - Feedback: toast, alert, badge, empty

**Build Tool:** Vite with TailwindCSS v4 plugin

---

### 5. CSS Organization - Theme & Custom Properties

**Global CSS File:** `src/index.css` (10,294 bytes)

**Current CSS Custom Property Hierarchy:**

**Root variables** (lines 64-121):
```css
--radius: 0.625rem
--background: var(--color-white)
--foreground: var(--color-neutral-800)
--card: var(--color-white)
--card-foreground: var(--color-neutral-800)
--popover, --popover-foreground

```

**Dark Mode Override** (lines 93-120):
- Conditional variant with `.dark` class selector
- Separate color values for dark theme
- Different alpha values for shadows and borders

**TailwindCSS Theme Mapping** (lines 5-44):
- Bridges CSS custom properties to Tailwind theme:
  - `--color-*` variables for all semantic colors
  - `--radius-sm/md/lg/xl/2xl/3xl/4xl` computed from base radius
  - Custom animation: `--animate-skeleton`

**Key CSS Features:**
- Uses TailwindCSS 4 with `@import "tailwindcss"`
- Custom variant for dark mode: `@custom-variant dark (&:is(.dark, .dark *))`
- Transition suppression during theme changes: `.no-transitions` class
- OKLCh color space for primary and ring colors
- Terminal scrollbar customization for xterm
- Chat markdown rendering with custom styling
- Diff panel theme bridging

**Theme Implementation Details:**
- Applied at document root via `document.documentElement.classList.toggle("dark", isDark)`
- LocalStorage key: `"t3code:theme"`
- System preference detection: `window.matchMedia("(prefers-color-scheme: dark)")`
- Cross-tab synchronization via storage events
- No-transitions class prevents flash during theme changes

---

### 6. Existing Theme-Related Code

**Theme Hook** (`src/hooks/useTheme.ts`):
- Custom React hook using `useSyncExternalStore`
- Manages three modes: "light", "dark", "system"
- Persists to localStorage under key `"t3code:theme"`
- Detects system preference changes
- Applies class to document root immediately on load
- Includes transition suppression logic
- Returns: `{ theme, setTheme, resolvedTheme }` where resolvedTheme is computed "light" | "dark"

**Settings Integration** (`src/routes/_chat.settings.tsx`):
- Integrates `useTheme()` hook
- Settings page at `/chat/settings`
- Theme options: System, Light, Dark with descriptions
- Uses Select component for theme picker

**Media Query Hook** (`src/hooks/useMediaQuery.ts`):
- Helper for responsive design queries

**App Settings Store** (`src/appSettings.ts`):
- Separate from theme
- Uses Zustand pattern with localStorage
- Handles Codex model configs, service tier, streaming settings
- Storage key: `"t3code:app-settings:v1"`
- Legacy key migration support

---

### 7. Key Integration Points for Theme Feature

**Router Context Setup** (`src/router.ts`):
```typescript
export function getRouter(history: RouterHistory) {
  const queryClient = new QueryClient();
  return createRouter({
    routeTree,
    history,
    context: { queryClient },
    Wrap: ({ children }) =>
      createElement(
        QueryClientProvider,
        { client: queryClient },
        createElement(StoreProvider, null, children),
      ),
  });
}
```

**Root Route Structure** (`src/routes/__root.tsx`):
- Wraps with `ToastProvider` and `AnchoredToastProvider`
- Includes `EventRouter` component for event handling
- Includes `DesktopProjectBootstrap` for Electron initialization
- Renders `Outlet` for child routes

**Providers Available:**
- StoreProvider (Zustand)
- QueryClientProvider (React Query)
- ToastProvider (custom)
- AnchoredToastProvider

**Tailwind Configuration:**
- Uses Vite plugin: `@tailwindcss/vite` v4.0.0
- Configured in vite.config.ts
- Full dark mode support through CSS custom properties

---

### Summary Table: Files to Consider for Theme Feature

| Category | Files |
|----------|-------|
| **Theme Logic** | `/apps/web/src/hooks/useTheme.ts` |
| **Global Styles** | `/apps/web/src/index.css` |
| **Settings UI** | `/apps/web/src/routes/_chat.settings.tsx` |
| **Router/Context** | `/apps/web/src/router.ts`, `/apps/web/src/routes/__root.tsx` |
| **Global Store** | `/apps/web/src/store.ts` |
| **App Settings** | `/apps/web/src/appSettings.ts` |
| **Build Config** | `/apps/web/vite.config.ts`, `/apps/web/tsconfig.json` |
| **UI Components** | `/apps/web/src/components/ui/*.tsx` (40 components) |
| **Main Entry** | `/apps/web/src/main.tsx` |

The codebase already has a solid theme system in place with localStorage persistence, system preference detection, dark mode CSS custom properties, and settings UI integration. The architecture is well-suited for extending theme functionality with additional customization options.

content.text:
Everything looks clean. Here's a summary of everything that was built:

---

## What was implemented

### `packages/shared/src/theme.ts` *(new)*
Defines the complete theme type system — `AppThemeId`, `ThemeSelection`, `ThemeColorTokens` (29 CSS custom property keys), `AppTheme` — plus the three built-in theme objects and helper utilities (`getThemeById`, `BUILT_IN_THEMES`, `DEFAULT_DARK_THEME_ID`, `DEFAULT_LIGHT_THEME_ID`). No runtime dependencies; pure TypeScript types and data.

### `packages/shared/package.json`
Added `./theme` subpath export following the same pattern as `./model`, `./git`, etc.

### `apps/web/src/contexts/ThemeContext.tsx` *(new)*
The core of the new system. Implements a module-level external store (same `useSyncExternalStore` pattern as the old hook) plus React Context:
- **Immediate DOM application** on module import prevents any flash before React hydrates
- **`applyThemeToDOM`** sets all 29 CSS custom properties as inline styles on `:root` (overriding stylesheet defaults), toggles `.dark` for Tailwind, and sets `color-scheme` for native controls
- **Cross-tab sync** via `storage` events; **system pref tracking** via `matchMedia`
- **`ThemeProvider`** memoises the context value and keeps the DOM in sync via `useEffect`
- **`useTheme`** hook returns `{ colorTheme, activeTheme, resolvedTheme, themes, setColorTheme }` — `resolvedTheme: "light" | "dark"` is preserved for backwards compatibility

### `apps/web/src/hooks/useTheme.ts` *(replaced)*
Now a one-line re-export from `ThemeContext`, so all four existing consumers (`ChatView`, `DiffPanel`, `DiffWorkerPoolProvider`, `ChatMarkdown`) continue destructuring `{ resolvedTheme }` without any changes.

### `apps/web/src/components/ThemeSelector.tsx` *(new)*
Displays all built-in themes as selectable cards in a responsive 3-column grid. Each card contains:
- **`ThemePreview`** — a miniature mockup (sidebar strip + content area with simulated text lines and accent dots + status bar hint), rendered entirely from the theme's CSS token values via inline styles
- Theme name and description
- Three colour swatch dots (background · accent · sidebar) with `title` attributes
- An "Active" badge on the selected card

### `apps/web/src/index.css`
- Added 10 new entries to `@theme inline` (`--color-sidebar`, `--color-editor`, `--color-terminal`, `--color-status-bar`, plus their foreground/border variants) so `bg-sidebar` etc. work as Tailwind utilities
- Added light-mode defaults and dark-mode overrides for the same new tokens in `:root`

### `apps/web/src/routes/_chat.settings.tsx`
Replaced the old three-radio-button Appearance section with a single `<ThemeSelector />`.

### `apps/web/src/main.tsx`
Wrapped `<RouterProvider>` with `<ThemeProvider>` so the context is available everywhere in the app.
